Hey Kristýna, how are you?

Infrequently published stories about living abroad

I started a blog in 2018 when I moved to Germany for my PhD, as a way to share my new life with my family and friends. I quickly realized how time consuming it is, so there are only a few stories. However, every couple of years, I feel like adding a story. Most of the stories here are a copy of the original versions published on blogger.

  • Dortmunder Nachtschicht 2022 (21.10.2022)
    A reportage from an overnight German puzzle game. This story is written in German.
  • Hair story (03.04.2021)
    I shaved my head. Why?
  • Auf Deutsch leben (19.10.2018)
    Even in Germany, English might not be sufficient. So you have to improvise with the German vocabulary you have.
  • Moving to Dortmund (10.10.2018)
    Don't get scammed when looking for an apartment.
  • How to get a "Führungszeugnis" (07.10.2018)
    When moving to a new country, you always need a document you didn't think of.
